name: Louis Mountbatten
longDesc: Louis Mountbatten dirige les Combined Operations puis le South East Asia Command à partir de 1943. Carte WC4 navale A argent orientée opérations amphibies : second choix derrière Cunningham, utile sur la Birmanie.

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: 24% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Sailor
skills.desc: Counter attack +6% when attacked by the enemy at sea

skills.name: Depot Ship
skills.desc: Fix damaged ship units: each round HP+6

skills.name: Emplacement libre
skills.desc: Compétence apprenable — à remplir via l'Académie.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Louis Mountbatten commanded Combined Operations and then, from 1943, South East Asia Command. A WC4 silver-A navy card oriented toward amphibious operations — a second choice behind Cunningham, useful on Burma.
longDescDe: Louis Mountbatten leitete Combined Operations und ab 1943 das South East Asia Command. Im WC4 eine Silber-A-Marinekarte mit Schwerpunkt auf Amphibienoperationen — Zweitwahl hinter Cunningham, nützlich für das Burma-Szenario.
